violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Do not reuse food containers. (Baking powder used to store salt.)

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving in walk in cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean storage shelving in kitchen. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler. -Clean step stool and table fan.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors walls and ceiling thoroughly including in walk in cooler.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop was sitting in water.
